name: Ukuthwasa
description: A spiritual calling and initiation process to become a Sangoma (traditional healer). Involves intensive training in herbal medicine, divination, and ancestral communication.

name: Lobola
description: A process of bride price negotiation between families. It is a gesture of uniting two families and showing appreciation for the bride's upbringing. It traditionally involves the exchange of cattle.

name: Ihlombe
description: A communal gathering for celebration, often involving singing, dancing, and feasting. It is a way to strengthen community bonds and celebrate important occasions.

name: Ukuhlabela
description: Ritualistic animal sacrifice to appease or communicate with ancestors. It is performed during important ceremonies like weddings, funerals, and initiations.

name: Rites of Passage (various)
description: Ceremonies marking significant life stages, such as birth, coming of age, marriage, and death. These vary significantly between different cultural groups.

name: Storytelling (Iintsomi/Inganekwane)
description: An oral tradition of passing down history, cultural values, and lessons through myths, legends, and fables. It is a cornerstone of cultural education.

name: Beer Brewing (Umqombothi)
description: The traditional brewing of sorghum beer, which is an important part of social and ceremonial gatherings. It is often used as an offering to the ancestors.
